hero.title: Build Anything, Configure Everything

create.title: Create New Permission
create.fillFields: Fill in fields above to generate key
create.defaultStatusDesc: Should this permission be allowed by default?

create.unconfiguredCount: {{count}} permission(s) not yet configured for selected roles
create.allConfiguredDesc: Switch to "Create New" to add a custom permission.
create.adminOnlyManagerGuest: As admin, you can only manage permissions for your managers and guests.
create.syncWarningNoFrontend: This permission key exists in backend but has no frontend UI mapping. Consider adding a frontend entry too.
create.syncWarningNoBackend: This permission key exists in frontend but has no backend API mapping. The UI element may display but API calls will be rejected.
create.syncWarningContinue: Do you want to continue anyway?
